fields.label: Disk drives
fields.collector: Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_DiskDrive -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Index, Model, Manufacturer, SerialNumber, InterfaceType, MediaType, Size, Partitions, PNPDeviceID

column.name: DiskDrives
column.description: Physical disk drives as a JSON array (model, manufacturer, serial, interface, media type, size, partition count) from Win32_DiskDrive.
